coverage.forecastRange: No auditable group-wide annual revenue or net-income forecast retained
coverage.availabilityNote: FY2016-FY2025 are official PETRONAS Group annual actuals converted from RM. No auditable group-wide annual forecast series is retained.

metrics.fxMethod: Divide by annual RM per USD
metrics.basis: PETRONAS Group annual consolidated figures reported in RM million and converted to USD million using the World Bank annual official exchange rate. Revenue is total revenue as originally reported for each financial year; capex is the annual cash purchase of PPE and related capital assets; FCF is derived.
metrics.verificationNote: Official PETRONAS annual reports, audited financial statements and full-year financial reports were used. RM values are retained in the reference workbook, then divided by the World Bank annual RM/USD official exchange rate. FCF is derived as CFO plus capex.

profitability.title: Revenue and Net Income
profitability.subtitle: USD million
profitability.sourceLine: Source: FY2025 Audited Financial Statements，FY2025 Integrated Report
profitability.note: Official consolidated annual disclosures; no forecast series retained.

cashInvestment.title: Investments and Free Cash Flow
cashInvestment.titleCn: PETRONAS 投资与自由现金流
cashInvestment.subtitle: USD million
cashInvestment.basisLabel: Cash capex / investment proxy and derived FCF
cashInvestment.sourceLine: Source: FY2025 Audited Financial Statements，FY2025 Integrated Report
cashInvestment.note: Investment bars show capex cash outflows. FCF equals operating cash flow plus capex.

definitions.definition: Group consolidated annual revenue, using the line item labelled Revenue or Sales in the source disclosure.
Group consolidated profit or loss for the year, including non-controlling interests where presented in the consolidated statement.
Net cash from operating activities in the consolidated annual cash-flow statement.
Derived consistently as operating cash flow plus the normalized negative capex value; it is not asserted to be the company's separately reported non-GAAP FCF.
Cash acquisition or purchase of productive assets / PPE and related capital assets where disclosed. It is stored as a negative cash outflow and displayed as a positive investment bar.
Cash and cash equivalents at end of year from the consolidated cash-flow statement, converted using the annual World Bank rate.
RM amounts are divided by the World Bank annual Malaysia official exchange rate (LCU per USD, period average). The source is retained in the workbook.

sources.title: PETRONAS Audited Financial Statements 2025
sources.notes: Official audited consolidated PETRONAS financial statements.

sources.title: PETRONAS Integrated Report 2025
sources.notes: Official PETRONAS integrated-report portal and financial-performance cross-check.

sources.title: World Bank - Malaysia Official Exchange Rate
sources.notes: World Bank indicator PA.NUS.FCRF, Malaysian ringgit per USD, period average. RM figures are divided by the annual rate.
